title: Armors & Stuff X Bare Bones
description: Armors & Stuff resource pack simpifed to fit the world of Bare Bones
body:
![new title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05259e1ec6faff3f2588de7c1c8eab59b4b02342.png)
# About

[**Armors & Stuff**](https://modrinth.com/project/ME5tOZf0) **X** [**Bare Bones**](https://modrinth.com/project/rox3U8B6) is an accurate Java Edition recreation of the original [**Action & Stuff**](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp/oreville-studios/actions--stuff-1.4/61c7a786-d7ad-49e0-a710-817121cd9795) armor textures, bringing the stylized Bedrock aesthetic to your Java gameplay. It supports **all armor trims** and integrates with the majority of player animation mods and resource packs, This variation is specifically designed to the minimalist, clean theme of the [**Bare Bones**](https://modrinth.com/project/rox3U8B6) look. It complements the core pack and streamlines the appearance to trailer-style simplicity.


## Features

- Armors from [**Action & Stuff**](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp/oreville-studios/actions--stuff-1.4/61c7a786-d7ad-49e0-a710-817121cd9795), re-made to fit the [**Bare Bones**](https://modrinth.com/project/rox3U8B6) look.
- Supports **all trim variants** for maximum visual fidelity.
- Fully compatible with a huge majority of **resource packs and player animation mods**.
- Fully compatible with **Minecraft 1.21.3+**.

## Installation

1. Get the most recent version compatible with your Minecraft 1.21.3+ installation.
2. Put it inside your resource pack folder and enable it ingame.

##  Support & Feedback

Need ideas or have compatibility issues? Let me know, Contact me via my discord account: noahain, feedback enhances support and future showings!

## Disclaimer

All textures featured in this resource pack are **fan-made recreations** based on the visual style of the original [**Action & Stuff**](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp/oreville-studios/actions--stuff-1.4/61c7a786-d7ad-49e0-a710-817121cd9795) pack by **Oreville Studios**.  
This project is **not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Mojang, Microsoft, or Oreville Studios** in any way.  
All recreated assets were designed from scratch to replicate the **style and feel** of the original Bedrock Edition content for **Java Edition** players.
